novel_features.name: Library backlog audit
novel_features.description: Surface never-launched games, paid titles you bounced off in under 2 hours, and where your hours actually went by genre.

novel_features.name: Friend playtime comparison on one app
novel_features.description: Rank everyone in your friend list by hours spent in a specific game, with throttled fan-out so you don't trip Steam's 25 req/s budget.

novel_features.name: Next easiest achievement to unlock (cross-library)
novel_features.description: Across your entire library, surface the achievement with the highest global unlock percentage that you still don't have.

novel_features.name: Per-app achievement workbench
novel_features.description: Render the full achievement schema for one app side-by-side with your unlock state and the global rarity of each achievement in one table.

novel_features.name: Rarest unlocked achievements (flex view)
novel_features.description: Surface your rarest achievement unlocks across all owned games — the inverse of the next-achievement query, sorted by ascending global percentage.

novel_features.name: Library diff between two SteamIDs
novel_features.description: Set operations across two libraries — what's mine-only, what's theirs-only, what's shared with playtime delta.

novel_features.name: Currently-playing friends
novel_features.description: Show which friends are in-game right now and what they're playing — one batched API call across the friend list, no fanout.

novel_features.name: Achievement leaderboard among friends
novel_features.description: Rank your friends by achievement completion percentage for one app, throttled fan-out via the same limiter that powers friends compare.

novel_features.name: Review velocity for one app
novel_features.description: Reviews per day and voted-up share over a rolling window for one app — date-bucket aggregation over the cursor-paginated appreviews stream.

novel_features.name: News full-text search across tracked apps
novel_features.description: FTS5 search across the title and contents of every news post you've synced, optionally scoped by appid or date range.

novel_features.name: Concurrent-player trend for one app
novel_features.description: Show concurrent-player count over time for one app as a sparkline plus min/max/last over a rolling window — value scales with how often you sample.
